nasb.text: If I partake with thankfulness, why am I slandered concerning that for which I give thanks?

esv.text: If I partake with thankfulness, why am I denounced because of that for which I give thanks?

cnv.text: 我若存著感恩的心吃了，為甚麼我因著我所感恩的食物被人毀謗呢？

ccb.text: 如果我存感恩的心吃，为什么还要受批评呢？”

csbs.text: 如果我怀着感恩的心领受，难道有什么能使我为所感谢的东西而受到毁谤吗？
